privileged_info_summary: The Simon Task dataset is synthetically generated via a python script in setup_task.sh, yielding 25 valid participants (s1 to s25) and one contaminated auto-responder participant ('s99') with an impossibly uniform reaction time. The output report is expected at /home/ga/pebl/analysis/simon_report.json.
